Off Calendar Jan-08-2004 Set For Trial On Jun-28-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jun-02-04 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 210
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Mediate in Lieu of Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to Submit a Proposed Order within five days. Court ordered a Jury Trial Date of 6/28/2004 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give notice of the Trial Date and of the Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause set on 3/24/2004 at 10:00 AM. Proceedings reported by: Rhonda Fung. (212)
